name: @ggui-samples/gadget-leaflet
description: Reference ggui COMPONENT gadget around Leaflet (https://leafletjs.com). Demonstrates the defineGadgetPackage SDK with a 3rd-party JS library: bundles Leaflet at build time, exposes a single `LeafletMap` component to ggui-generated UIs, and ships the registry descriptor inline (`leafletGadget`). Not published — sample only.
